# Travel Journal: Pacific Northwest

## Day 1: Arriving in Portland

We landed at PDX in the early afternoon. The airport's carpet is famous for a reason.

![Portland Airport Carpet](https://example.com/photos/pdx-carpet.jpg)

## Day 2: Columbia River Gorge

The gorge offered some of the most stunning views of the entire trip.

![Multnomah Falls cascading down mossy cliffs](https://example.com/photos/multnomah-falls.jpg "Multnomah Falls, Oregon")

## Day 3: Mount Hood

We hiked the Timberline Trail with clear skies overhead.

![](https://example.com/photos/mount-hood-panorama.jpg)

The photo above intentionally has no alt text to test empty-alt rendering.

## Inline Image in a Paragraph

The trail marker ![trail blaze](https://example.com/icons/blaze.png) appeared every quarter mile, making navigation straightforward even without GPS.

Images are a planned feature. These fixtures will validate rendering once the TipTap `Image` extension is added.
